pages.title: Party Command
pages.text: $(br)Create parties in multiplayer games to build bases together and resist invasions$(br)$(li)Members in the same party can always see each other on the map$(br)$(li)For other dimensions, open world map and click button at the bottom left to switch dimensions to view others

pages.title: Leader
pages.text: $(br)Create party:$(br)$(l)$(c:/openpac-parties create)/openpac-parties create/$$(p)Invite members:$(br)$(l)/openpac-parties member invite <player name>/$$(p)Remove members:$(br)$(l)/openpac-parties member kick <player name>/$
Disband party:$(br)$(l)/openpac-parties destroy confirm/$$(p)If leaders want to join another party, they must first disband their own party

pages.title: Member
pages.text: $(br)Join party: Click agree in the chat after receiving an invitation from the leader$(p)Leave party:$(br)$(l)/openpac-parties leave/$$(p)Send messages within the party:$(br)$(l)/opm <message>/$
